satire_attempt: Worship at the altar of LinkedIn, dear engineer: the Bhagavad Gita itself confirms that infamy is worse than death. So when your principal engineer peer is on a hiring loop, give them a great Glassdoor review. Otherwise: imperishable disrepute. Pre-order my book Personal Branding For The Conscious Coder.
verdict_reason: The satire requires the verse to bless personal-brand-management. The falsifiability paragraph explicitly excludes this: 'Performance-theatre, popularity, conference-circuit visibility — none of those are this verse.' The verse is restricted to substantive peer-modelling under load, with sambhāvitasya scoping. To satirise it as personal-branding requires inverting the falsifiability. PASS.
